title: ** Above All Powers

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Above all powers
Above all kings
Above all nature and all created things
Above all wisdom and all the ways of man
You were here before the world began

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Above all kingdoms
Above all thrones
Above all wonders the world has ever known
Above all wealth and treasures of the earth
There's no way to measure what You're worth

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Crucified, laid behind the stone
You lived to die, rejected and alone
Like a rose trampled on the ground
You took the fall
And thought of me
Above all

title: ** Alive, Alive, Alive Forevermore

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Alive, alive, alive forevermore
My Jesus is alive, alive forevermore
Alive, alive, alive forevermore
My Jesus is alive, alive forevermore
My Jesus is alive forevermore

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Sing hallelujah, sing hallelujah
My Jesus is alive forevermore
Sing hallelujah, sing hallelujah
My Jesus is alive forevermore

title: ** All I Once Held Dear

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: All I once held dear, built my life upon
All this world reveres, and wars to own
All I once thought gain I have counted loss
Spent and worthless now, compared to this

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Knowing you, Jesus, knowing you,
There is no greater thing
You're my all, you're the best
You're my joy, my righteousness
And I love you, Lord

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Now my heart's desire is to know you more
To be found in you and known as yours
To possess by faith what I could not earn
All-surpassing gift of righteousness

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Oh, to know the power of your risen life
And to know You in Your sufferings
To become like you in your death, my Lord
So with you to live and never die

title: ** Alleluia, For The Lord God Almighty Reigns

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Alleluia, Alleluia, alleluia
For the Lord God Almighty reigns
Alleluia, Alleluia
For the Lord God Almighty reigns

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Alleluia, holy, holy
You Lord God Almighty
Worthy is the Lamb, worthy is the Lamb
You are holy, holy
You Lord God Almighty
Worthy is the Lamb, worthy is the Lamb
Amen

title: ** Come Thou Fount Of Every Blessing

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Come, Thou Fount of every blessing
Tune my heart to sing Thy grace
Streams of mercy, never ceasing
Call for songs of loudest praise
Teach me some melodious sonnet
Sung by flaming tongues above
Praise the mount, I'm fixed upon it
Mount of Thy redeeming love

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Here I raise my Ebenezer
Here there by Thy great help I've come
And I hope, by Thy good pleasure
Safely to arrive at home
Jesus sought me when a stranger
Wandering from the fold of God
He, to rescue me from danger
Interposed His precious blood

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Oh, to grace how great a debtor
Daily I'm constrained to be
Let that goodness like a fetter
Bind my wandering heart to Thee
Prone to wander, Lord, I feel it
Prone to leave the God I love
Here's my heart, oh, take and seal it
Seal it for Thy courts above

title: ** El Elah, Elohim

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: El Elah, Elohim
How we long to worship You
El Elah, Elohim
How we long to worship You

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lord, we come to You in worship
No matter what the circumstance
No matter what the situation
We will lift up holy hands.

title: ** Every Praise Is To Our God

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Every praise is to our God.
Every word of worship with one accord..repeat
Every praise every praise
Is to our God

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sing hallelujah to our God
Glory hallelujah is due our God
Every praise every praise is to our God.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: God my Savior
God my Healer
God my Deliverer
Yes He is, yes He is

title: ** He Looked Beyond My Faults

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Amazing Grace shall always be my song of praise
For it was grace that bought my liberty
I do not know just why He came to love me so
He looked beyond my faults and saw my need

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I shall forever lift mine eyes to Calvary
To view the cross where Jesus died for me
How marvelous the grace that caught my falling soul
He looked beyond my faults and saw my need

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: If not for grace, my soul would be a drifting ship
With no safe harbor from the angry waves
But Calvary's Cross shines brightest through the darkest storm
And just in time His mercy rescued me

title: ** Here I Am To Worship

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Light of the World
You stepped down into darkness
Open my eyes, Let me see
Beauty that made
This heart adore You
Hope of a life
Spent with You

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Here I am to worship
Here I am to bow down
Here I am to say that You're my God
You're altogether lovely
Altogether worthy
Altogether wonderful to me

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: King of all days
Oh, so highly exalted
Glorious in Heaven above
Humbly You came
To the earth You created
All for love's sake became poor

title: ** I Enter The Holy Of Holies

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I enter the Holy of Holies
I enter through the blood of the Lamb
I enter to worship You only
I enter to honor I Am

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Lord I worship You,
I worship You,
For Your name is Holy, Holy Lord
For Your name is Holy, Holy Lord

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A Chord
Who was and Who is
And Who is to Come

title: ** Holy Words Long Preserved

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Holy words long preserved
For our walk in this world,
They resound with God's own heart
Oh, let the Word of God impart.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Holy words ever true
Changing me, and changing you.
We have come with open hearts
Oh let the Word of God impart.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Words of Life, words of Hope
Give us strength, help us cope
In this world, where e'er we roam
Word of God will guide us Home.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Holy words of our Faith
Handed down to this age.
Came to us through sacrifice
Oh heed the faithful words of Christ.

title: ** I Know The Master Of The Winds

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: My boat of life sails on a troubled sea
Whenever there's a wind in my sail.
But I have a friend who watches over me
When the breeze turns into a gale.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: I know the Master of the wind.
I know the Maker of the rain.
He can calm a storm, make the sun shine again.
I know the Master of the wind.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sometimes I soar like an eagle through the sky
Above the peaks my soul can be found.
An unexpected storm may drive me from the heights
Brings me low, but never brings me down.

title: ** I'll Sing Praises To You Name

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I sing praises to your name, oh lord
Praises to your name, oh lord
For your name is great
And worthy to be praised

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I give glory to your name, oh lord
Glory to your name, oh lord
For your name is great
And worthy to be praised

title: ** In Your Presence

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In Your presence
That's where I am strong
In Your presence
O Lord my God
In Your presence
That's where I belong
Seeking Your face
Touching Your grace
In the cleft of the Rock
In Your presence O God

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I want to go, where the rivers
Cannot overflow me
Where my feet are on the rock
I want to hide, where the blazing fire cannot
burn me
In Your presence O God

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: I want to hide, where the flood of
Evil cannot reach me
Where I'm covered by the blood
I want to be where the schemes of darkness
Cannot touch me
In Your presence O God

title: ** No Longer Slaves

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: You unravel me, with a melody
You surround me with a song
Of deliverance, from my enemies
Till all my fears have gone

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: I'm no longer a slave to fear
I am a child of God
I'm no longer a slave to fear
I am a child of God

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: From my mother's womb
You have chosen me
Your Love has called my name
I've been born again, into a family
Your blood flows through my veins

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: You split the sea
So I could walk right through it
My fears are drowned in perfect love
You rescued me
So I could stand and say
I am a child of God

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: I am surrounded
By the arms of the father
I am surrounded
By songs of deliverance
We've been liberated
From our bondage
We're the sons and the daughters
Let us sing our freedom

title: ** Lord I Come To Thee

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lord I come to You
Let my heart be changed, renewed
Flowing from the grace
That I've found in You
Lord I've come to know
The weaknesses I see in me
Will be stripped away
By the power of Your love

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Hold me close
Let Your love surround me
Bring me near
Draw me to Your side
And as I wait
I'll rise up like the eagle
And I will soar with You
Your Spirit leads me on
In the power of Your love

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lord unveil my eyes
Let me see You face to face
The knowledge of Your love
As You live in me
Lord renew my mind
As Your will unfolds in my life
In living every day
By the power of Your love

title: ** Our God Is An Awesome God

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Our God is an awesome God
He reigns from heaven above
With wisdom, power, and love
Our God is an awesome God

title: ** Take Me Past The Outer Court

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Take me past the outer courts,
Into the holy place,
Past the brazen altar.
Lord I want to see Your face.
Pass me by the crowds of people
And the priests who sing Your praise.
I hunger and thirst for Your righteousness,
But it's only found in one place.

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Take me in to the holy of holies.
Take me in by the blood of the lamb.
Take me in to the holy of holies.
Take the coal, touch my lips, here I am.

title: ** Still (Hide Me Now)

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hide me now
Under Your wings
Cover me
Within Your mighty hand

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: When the oceans rise and thunders roar
I will soar with you above the storm
Father, You are King over the flood
I will be still and know You are God

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Find rest my soul
In Christ alone
Know His power
In quietness and trust

title: ** Open The Eyes Of My Heart

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Open the eyes of my heart Lord
Open the eyes of my heart
I want to see you
......repeat

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: To see you higher and lifted up
Shining in the light of your glory
Lord pour out your power and love
As we sing holy holy holy
Holy holy holy (2)
I want to see you

title: ** Thank You For The Cross, Lord

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Thank you for the cross, Lord
Thank you for the price You paid
Bearing all my sin and shame
In love You came
And gave amazing grace
Thank you for this love, Lord
Thank you for the nail pierced hands
Washed me in Your cleansing flow
Now all I know
Your forgiveness and embrace

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Worthy is the Lamb
Seated on the throne
Crown You now with many crowns
You reign victorious
High and lifted up
Jesus Son of God
The treasure of Heaven crucified
Worthy is the Lamb
Worthy is the Lamb

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Thank you for the cross, Lord
Thank you for the price You paid
Bearing all my sin and shame
In love You came
And gave amazing grace
Thank you for this love, Lord
Thank you for the nail pierced hands
Washed me in Your cleansing flow
Now all I know
Your forgiveness and embrace

title: ** Lord I Lift Your Name On High

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lord I lift your name on high
Lord I love to sing your praises
i'm so glad you are in my life
i'm so glad you came to save us

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: You came from heaven to earth, to show the way
From the earth to the cross, my debt to pay
From the cross to the grave, from the grave to the sky
Lord I lift your name on high

title: ** Sometimes Hallelujah

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sometimes Hallelujah
Sometimes Praise The Lord
Sometimes Gently Singing,
Our Hearts In One Accord

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Oh let us lift our voices,
Look toward the sky and start to sing
Oh let us now return His love,
Just let our voices ring
Oh let us feel His presence,
Let the sound of praises fill the air
Oh let us sing the song of Jesus' love,
To people everywhere.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Oh let our joy be unconfined,
Let us sing with freedom unrestrained
Let's take this feeling that we're feeling now,
Outside these walls and let it rain.
Oh let the Spirit overflow,
As we are filled from head to toe.
We love you Lord with all our Hearts,
And we want this world to know.

title: ** What shall I render unto Jehovah

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: You've done so much for me
I cannot tell it all
Narekele mo ( Take my thanksgiving )
If I had ten thousand tongues
It still won't be enough
Narekele mo ( Take my thanksgiving )

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The God that heals my sickness
When You heal, You heal completely
Narekele mo ( Take my thanksgiving )
Chukwu mara obim o (The God that knows my heart )
Isi ikendu le ( Living Water )
We sing now
Narekele mo

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: What shall I render to Jehovah?
For He has done so very much for me
What shall I render to Jehovah?
For He has done so very much for me

sections.label: Outro
lines: Nara, nara eh (Take, take, take thanksgiving)
Narekele
Narekele mo
We sing Nara, nara, eh
Narekele
Narekele mo
{genre:Praise}

title: ** In Christ Alone my Hope is found

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In Christ alone my hope is found
He is my light, my strength, my song
This cornerstone, this solid ground
Firm through the fiercest drought and storm
What heights of love, what depths of peace
When fears are stilled, when strivings cease
My comforter, my all in all
Here in the love of Christ I stand

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: In Christ alone who took on flesh
Fullness of God in helpless babe
This gift of love and righteousness
Scorned by the ones He came to save
Till on that cross as Jesus died
The wrath of God was satisfied
For every sin on Him was laid
Here in the death of Christ I live

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: There in the ground His body lay
Light of the world by darkness slain
Then bursting forth in glorious day
Up from the grave He rose again
And as He stands in victory
Sin's curse has lost its grip on me
For I am His and He is mine
Bought with the precious blood of Christ

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: No guilt in life, no fear in death
This is the power of Christ in me
From life's first cry to final breath
Jesus commands my destiny
No power of hell, no scheme of man
Can ever pluck me from His hand
Till He returns or calls me home
Here in the power of Christ I'll stand

title: ** Goodness of God | I Love you Lord

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: ... I love You, Lord
For Your mercy never fails me
All my days, I've been held in Your hands
From the moment that I wake up
Until I lay my head
Oh, I will sing of the goodness of God

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: ... And all my life You have been faithful
And all my life You have been so, so good
With every breath that I am able
Oh, I will sing of the goodness of God

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: ... I love Your voice
You have led me through the fire
In the darkest night
You are close like no other
I've known You as a Father
I've known You as a Friend
And I have lived in the goodness of God (yeah)

sections.label: Bridge
lines: ... 'Cause Your goodness is running after
It's running after me
Your goodness is running after
It's running after me
With my life laid down
I'm surrendered now
I give You everything
'Cause Your goodness is running after
It's running after me (oh-oh)

sections.label: Outro
lines: ... And all my life You have been faithful
And all my life You have been so, so good
With every breath that I am able
Oh, I'm gonna sing of the goodness of God
(I'm gonna sing, I'm gonna sing)
... 'Cause all my life You have been faithful
And all my life You have been so, so good
With every breath that I am able
Oh, I'm gonna sing of the goodness of God
Oh, I'm gonna sing of the goodness of God

title: ** He Knows my Name

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I have a Maker
He formed my heart
Before even time began
My life was in his hands

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: He knows my name
He knows my every thought
He sees each tear that falls
And He hears me when I call

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I have a Father
He calls me His own
He'll never leave me
No matter where I go

title: ** Hallowed be Thy Name

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hallowed be Thy Name
Jehovah God You reign
And You will never change, O Lord
Forever You're the same

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jehovah-Jireh
You supply my every need
Jehovah-Rapha
Perfect health You give to me

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Jehovah-Shalom
You're the One who gives me peace
Jehovah-Rohi
My faithful Shepherd leading me

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Jehovah-Mekaddesh
You're the One who makes me clean
Jehovah-Tsidkenu
Imparting righteousness to me

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Jehovah-Nissi
Lord, You reign in victory
Jehovah-Shammah
You are always there for me

title: ** You deserve the glory

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: You deserve the glory
And the honour
Lord we lift our hands in worship
As we lift your holy name
..repeat

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: For you are great, You do miracles so great
There is no one else like you,
...there is no one else like You
For you are great, You do miracles so great
There is no one else like you,
...there is no one else like You

title: ** Shout to the Lord, all the earth let us sing

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: My Jesus, my savior
Lord, there is none like You
All of my days, I want to praise
The wonders of Your mighty love
My comfort, my shelter
Tower of refuge and strength
Let every breath, all that I am
Never cease to worship You

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Shout to the Lord, all the earth let us sing
Power and majesty, praise to the King
Mountains bow down and the seas will roar
At the sound of Your name
I sing for joy at the work of Your hands
Forever I'll love You, forever I'll stand
Nothing compares to the promise I have in You

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: My Jesus, my savior
Lord, there is none like You
All of my days, I want to praise
The wonders of Your mighty love
You're my comfort, You're my shelter
You're my tower of refuge and strength
Let every breath, all that I am
Never cease to worship You

title: ** Give me that old time religion

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Give me that old time religion (3)
It's good enough for me
Give me that old time religion (3)
It's good enough for me

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: It was good for Paul and Silas (3)
It's good enough for me

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: It was good for our mothers,
It was good for our fathers,
It was good for the prophets,
It's good enough for me.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: It will take us all to heaven (3)
It's good enough for us

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: It will save us from the devil (3)
It's good enough for us

sections.label: Outro
lines: Give us that old time religion (2)
We'll go back to that...
Old time religion,
It's good enough for us

title: ** I come to the garden alone

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I come to the garden alone
While the dew is still on the roses
And the voice I hear, falling on my ear
The son of God discloses

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: And he walks with me
And he talks with me
And he tells me I am his own
And the joy we share as we tarry there
None other has ever known

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I'd stay in the garden with him
Though the night around me is falling
But he bids me go
Through the voice of woe
His voice to me is calling

title: ** This is the Air I Breathe

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: This is the Air I Breathe
This is the Air I Breathe
Your holy presence living in me
This is my daily bread
This is my daily bread
Your very word spoken to me

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: And I
I'm desperate for you
And I
I'm blessed, you found me
And I
I'm blessed, you washed me
And I
I'm blessed, you saved me

title: ** I will celebrate, sing unto the Lord

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I will celebrate, sing unto the Lord
I will sing to Him a new Song
...repeat

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I will praise Him, I will sing to Him a new song
I will praise Him, I will sing to Him a new song
...repeat

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: I will celebrate, sing unto the Lord
I will sing to Him a new Song

title: ** Will the circle be unbroken

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: Can the circle be unbroken,
By and by, Lord, bye and bye?
There's a better home a-waiting
In the sky, Lord, in the sky.

title: ** Welcome Holy Spirit, be here with Your Presence

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Welcome Holy Spirit be here with Your presence
Fill me with Your power
Live inside of me
..repeat

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: You're the living water Never-drying fountain
Comforter and Counsellor take complete control

title: ** Thank you Lord for your blessings on me!

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: While the world looks upon me
As I struggle along
They say I've got nothing
But they are so wrong
In my heart I'm rejoicing
How I wish they could see
Thank you Lord
For your blessing on me!

sections.label: CHORUS
lines: There's a roof up above me
I've a good place to sleep
There's food on my table
And shoes on my feet
You gave me your love Lord
And a fine family
Thank you Lord
For your blessings on me!

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I know I'm not wealthy
These clothes, they're not new
I don't have much money
But Lord I have you
And that's all that matters
Though the world may not see
Thank you Lord
For your blessings on me!

sections.label: Outro
lines: There's a roof up above me
I've a good place to sleep
There's food on my table
And shoes on my feet
You gave me your love Lord
And a fine family
Thank you Lord
For all your blessings on me!
